title: nenax microphylla
intro: Nenax microphylla, also known as the Indian pennywort or pennywort, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to tropical regions of the world. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. Its extracts have been found to have several health benefits, including lowering blood pressure, reducing oxidative stress, and exhibiting neuroprotective effects. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and capsules, where it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
